summary: Backend (9/9 pytest) and Frontend (full UI flow) tests passed for Manghani Toy Worldwide. All endpoints work without _id leakage; seeded 16 products, 4 categories, 3 reviews. UI flows verified: home sections, category cards (4), product cards, navbar search redirect to /shop?search=, category card navigation to /shop?category=<slug>, add-to-cart with badge update, wishlist toggle + persistence to /wishlist page, product detail page (image/price/qty/add/WhatsApp), floating WhatsApp button, cart page with WhatsApp checkout. All wa.me links present.

issues: Thunderbolt Pro 4WD Drift Racer image showed broken icon momentarily (Unsplash lazy-load). Add onError fallback or use loading skeleton; not blocking.

action_items: (Optional) Add image onError fallback in ProductCard to avoid transient broken-image icon when Unsplash is slow.
(Optional) Reduce trending product cards on home to a fixed grid; currently 8 cards rendered.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses @app.on_event('startup') which is deprecated in FastAPI; consider migrating to lifespan handlers.

CORS configured after include_router; functional but conventionally added before. Currently allows '*' with credentials which is invalid per CORS spec when allow_credentials=True (browsers will reject). Set explicit origins or set allow_credentials=False.
Search regex is unescaped — user input goes directly into MongoDB $regex. Low risk (read-only) but should escape special regex chars.
Product/Category responses correctly exclude _id projection; good.
seed_data_creation: POST /api/reviews created one TEST_Reviewer review entry (persisted). No cleanup endpoint provided.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers all 9 review-request bullets. UI Playwright flow validated home->search->category->detail->cart->wishlist. data-testids correctly present. CORS allow_origins='*' with allow_credentials=True is technically invalid—watch for browser blocks in production.
